next_steps: Obtain blood cultures, CBC with differential, and coagulation profile
Measure inflammatory markers including CRP, ESR, and procalcitonin
Perform urgent echocardiography to evaluate for coronary artery changes
Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotics for suspected bacterial sepsis (e.g., ceftriaxone) and consider doxycycline if Rickettsial disease is high on the differential
Dermatology consultation for skin biopsy (H&E and DIF) to rule out vasculitis
Perform diagnostic studies for Rickettsia rickettsii (PCR or serology) and COVID-19 PCR/antibody testing
Administer intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) and high-dose aspirin if Kawasaki disease criteria are met or highly suspected
